raw_excerpt: We're releasing LangChain 1.0 and LangGraph 1.0 — our first major versions of our open source frameworks! October 22, 2025. create_agent is the new abstraction. Built on LangGraph runtime. Middleware hooks (Human-in-the-loop, Summarization, PII redaction). langchain-core promoted to 1.0 with standardized content blocks. Python 3.9 dropped (EOL Oct 2025), requires 3.10+. Legacy code moves to langchain-classic. LangGraph 1.0 has durable state, built-in persistence, first-class HITL. Used by Uber, LinkedIn, Klarna, Rippling, JP Morgan, Blackrock, Cisco. 90M monthly downloads.
